_meta.description: NewTiburon.com forum section mapping to knowledgebase topics and credibility modifiers
_meta.notes: thread_count and view_count are snapshots from March 2026. section_credibility_modifier is additive to the composite score per scoring-algorithm.md.

gk-v6-na.label: V6 - Naturally Aspirated
gk-v6-na.notes: Highest volume performance section. Broad range — signal-to-noise varies widely. Priority contributors highly weighted here.

gk-v6-fi.label: V6 - Forced Induction
gk-v6-fi.notes: Specialized section — fewer contributors but deeper technical knowledge per thread.

gk-i4-na.label: I4 - Naturally Aspirated
gk-i4-na.relevance_note: I4 Beta engine (G4GC). Less relevant to G6BA V6 builds but useful for shared-platform content (suspension, body, electrical).

gk-i4-fi.label: I4 - Forced Induction
gk-i4-fi.relevance_note: I4-specific forced induction. Low relevance for V6 builds unless discussing shared components.

gk-engine-management.label: Engine Management
gk-engine-management.subtopics: ECU Piggyback Systems, Wiring Harnesses, Custom Wiring, etc
gk-engine-management.notes: High-value section: ECU tuning, wiring, standalone setups, Haltech/Megasquirt. +1 modifier because posts tend to be more technical and verifiable.

gk-wheel-tire-suspension.label: Wheel, Tire, & Suspension
gk-wheel-tire-suspension.subtopics: Lowering Springs, Coilovers, Shocks, Brakes, Wheels, Tires, etc

gk-exterior.label: Exterior
gk-exterior.subtopics: Bodykits, Lips, CF Hoods, Spoilers, Etc
gk-exterior.notes: Highest volume section overall but mostly cosmetic. Lower technical density. -1 modifier for technical claims originating here.

gk-interior.label: Interior
gk-interior.subtopics: Trim Kits, Racing Seats, Lighting, Gauges, etc
gk-interior.notes: Mostly aesthetic. Exceptions: gauge wiring and racing seat mounting threads can be technically valuable.

gk-audio-security.label: Audio & Security
gk-audio-security.subtopics: Headunits, Speakers, Amps, Alarms, Radar Detectors, etc
gk-audio-security.notes: Security/immobilizer threads are relevant to SMARTRA/BCM KB content. Audio threads have lower technical value for our purposes.
